articles.title: Leadership uncertainty 'enormously disruptive', former top civil servant warns
articles.description: Speaking on Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg, the former Cabinet Secretary said leadership transitions are "enormously disruptive".

articles.title: US-Iran talks to begin in Switzerland as Tehran says it closed Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: The US disputed Iran's claim the waterway is shut, a move Tehran says was a response to Israeli attacks in Lebanon.

articles.title: Nine people in critical condition among 100 injured in Bedford train crash
articles.description: British Transport Police says the collision, which killed a train driver, is being investigated.

articles.title: Man charged after suspected anti-Muslim attacks in Edinburgh
articles.description: Two people were injured close to a mosque and a man was later seen battering the door of a pizzeria as members of the public run away.
